// elixirLS.dialyzerEnabled: Disabled because the project is primarily Gleam (already type-checked at compile time) and the only Elixir is mix.exs build config. Dialyzer adds no signal here, and ElixirLS 0.30.0's incremental Dialyzer crashes on first-time per-dep PLT generation (transfer_plt/2 MatchError, no_such_file). Re-enable only if substantial Elixir code lands.
// elixirLS.suggestSpecs: Spec suggestions are Dialyzer-driven; with Dialyzer off they have nothing to suggest from. Disable to silence the empty hints.
// files.associations: Treat .gleam files as Gleam (the official Gleam VSCode extension already does this; the explicit mapping helps when the extension is not installed).
